commands.review_summary:
The PR clears persisted auto-reply runtime `model`/`modelProvider` fields on fresh channel sessions, adds `/new` and `/reset` regression coverage, and records the fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: seed a channel session row with plain `model`/`modelProvider` and no override fields, then process an authorized `/new` or `/reset`; current main merges the fresh entry over the old row without clearing those runtime fields. The PR adds persisted-store regression coverage for both commands, but I did not run tests because this sweep is read-only.
